description:
You are a security engineer who has been asked to rotate two production credentials that live in separate configuration files.

CURRENT FILES AND LOCATIONS
1. YAML file:  
   /home/user/app/config/settings.yaml  
   Current contents (exactly, including spaces):
   ```
   database:
     host: db.prod.internal
     username: admin
     password: OldPassword123!
   ```
2. TOML file:  
   /home/user/app/config/secrets.toml  
   Current contents (exactly):
   ```
   [api]
   token = "old_api_token_ABC123"
   expiry = "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"
   ```

CREDENTIAL ROTATION REQUIREMENTS
1. In /home/user/app/config/settings.yaml, change the value of the key `password` from  
   OldPassword123!  
   to  
   NewSecureP@ssw0rd!
2. In /home/user/app/config/secrets.toml, change the value of the key `token` from  
   "old_api_token_ABC123"  
   to  
   "new_api_token_XYZ789"  
   and change the value of `expiry` from  
   "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"  
   to  
   "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"

LOGGING REQUIREMENT
After performing the rotation, create a plaintext log file at  
/home/user/app/rotation.log  
containing exactly two lines (no extra spaces, no blank lines, case-sensitive):

Line 1:  
database.password: OldPassword123! -> NewSecureP@ssw0rd!

Line 2:  
api.token: old_api_token_ABC123 -> new_api_token_XYZ789

No timestamps or additional text are allowed.

VALIDATION DETAILS THE TEST SUITE WILL CHECK
• The YAML file must keep the same indentation and ordering, only the value of `password` changes.  
• The TOML file must keep the same structure and ordering, only the specified key values change.  
• rotation.log must exist, be exactly two lines long, and match the text above including the trailing newline at the end of the second line.  

Carry out the task in the terminal. Do not display the secret values in your console output; only the log file should contain them.
truth:
Final state expected by the grader:

1. /home/user/app/config/settings.yaml content (must end with newline):
```
database:
  host: db.prod.internal
  username: admin
  password: NewSecureP@ssw0rd!
```

2. /home/user/app/config/secrets.toml content (must end with newline):
```
[api]
token = "new_api_token_XYZ789"
expiry = "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"
```

3. /home/user/app/rotation.log content (must end with newline):
```
database.password: OldPassword123! -> NewSecureP@ssw0rd!
api.token: old_api_token_ABC123 -> new_api_token_XYZ789
```
